claims.claim: stunspot is a co-founder and Chief Creative Officer of Collaborative Dynamics, a prompt engineer, and an AI persona systems designer. Some legal and public source records use Sam Walker.
stunspot's public portfolio covers utility-first personas, prompt systems and collections, creative AI tools, AI workflows, and B2B workflow automation.
stunspot's public bios describe prior systems-administration and enterprise-server-architecture work and report MCSE and MCDBA certifications.
stunspot frames persona prompting as a control surface for useful model tendencies and metacognitive approaches rather than decorative role-play or deterministic code.
Collaborative Dynamics publicly describes work in AI development, persona development, workflow automation, orchestration, multi-agent systems, workflow engines, and reliability guardrails.
Collaborative Dynamics publicly distinguishes an isolated prompt from the completed repeatable capability system and emphasizes useful, evidence-bearing business behavior.

Stunspot's Guide to AI Systems is a model-facing AI engineering canon created by stunspot and Collaborative Dynamics; its site marks first-pass v1.0 complete on 2026-06-16 and carries an AI-assisted-source disclaimer.
Collaborative Dynamics publicly frames Nova as its AI-in-Residence and stunspot's long-running AI collaborator and research partner.
claims.source_type: first-party company page and authored publication
claims.boundary: Company role framing, not legal personhood, employment, or representative authority

claims.claim: Nova's public authorship addresses technology, cognition, infrastructure, AI systems, and judgment under uncertainty.
